Things were off.. in a way that the average extra wouldn’t notice but Bakugo, oh yeah HE noticed. When you two got down and dirty you were always a little extra distant.. a little more quiet, always quiet afterwards, just turning away from him and going to bed. And worst off you NEVER orgasmed. Even though your brushed him off it made his heart quicken with worry.

Now he was left in his dorm room, his mind riddled with worry. Was he getting worse? Were you sick? Were you losing attraction to him? And god forbid it was an affair. Due to this obvious dilemma that was eating away at Bakugo he was forced into deep thought about past events and what could have happened. Then he remembered. When you were talking to Mina during passing period she suddenly extended her fist and asked you “Put your hand on mine!” You had given her a questioning look but balled up your hand into a fist and put it over hers. It made her laugh out loud. “You’re a total masochist!” He had remembered her saying.. that if you put your fist over the persons fist had your a masochist and if you put your open hand over the persons fist than your a sadist..

That made him nearly fly out of his bed. No WONDER you were so distant.. he definitely wasn’t the same aggressive guy that bullied you in middle school. And that’s probably why you stayed glued to his hip like a damn dog.

But now he knew how to fix things and make you addicted to his dick again.

Lmaoooo, so I checked my amazing site MyReadingManga.info and a new bkdk fic dropped after forever. So I got some major inspo (i just took the plot and turned Deku into you).
